contents.value:
## `--fixed-size`

The exact partition size. Specify as an integer value optionally followed by one of the units "k"/"K" for kibibyte, "M" for mebibyte and "G" for gibibyte. The default unit if none is given is "M". Cannot be specified together with `--size`. An error occurs when assembling the disk image if the partition data is larger than `--fixed-size`.
